title: HypurrCo AMAs: CEX experience on a DEX?
summary_title: SuperSexy brings centralized exchange UX to Hyperliquid, $750M volume in one month
summary_description: Chris from SuperSexy explains building on-chain finance on Hyperliquid with familiar CEX experience, competitive 6bp fees, and Turnkey self-custody.

key_moments.label: Hyperco intro: 1.5B AUM validator, content, IRL events
Chris background: 6-7 years DeFi, MEV, Talisman wallet, Hyperliquid interview 2023
SuperSexy motivation: nobody actually doing on-chain finance despite Hyperliquid hype
SuperSexy builds CEX-like frontend on Hyperliquid with HyperLend integration
Fee structure: 6bp all-in, competitive with Binance 5.5bp, invite codes lower rates
$750M volume, top 5 ARPU, power users, no active marketing yet
New feature tonight: chase limit orders, feature parity with CEX priority
Security: Turnkey enterprise self-custody, audits in progress, in-app education
